session.user: Run prettier to fix formatting on specific files and report results. Execute: `npx prettier --write .claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md .claude/commands/erk/system/objective-plan-node.md` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the output.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to fix formatting on those specific files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier to fix formatting on specific files

session.assistant:
prettier passed: 2 files formatted successfully
Both files were processed by prettier: - `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md` (93ms) - `.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-plan-node.md` (39ms)
